title: [FIRRTL][LowerToHW] Remove DontTouch annotation after lowering
body:
This change is required to ensure that no annotations remain unprocessed in FIRRTL dialect, after lowering to `HW`.
Remove the `DontTouch` annotation after lowering it to symbols in `LowerToHW`.
Add a function in `AnnotationSet` to remove annotations of a given class name.
There will be another PR, to check for unprocessed annotations, which should also serve as a test case for this PR.
